strategy_description: Go fully long SPY when signal is bullish; move to cash otherwise.
notes: Backfilled 2026-04-23 from tournament_results_20260314.csv per Wave 10I.A; OOS dates reconstructed from default monthly/daily windows. Fields: signal_column=indpro_mom3m, threshold_rule=gt (inferred from T1_fixed_p75 + direction=procyclical), strategy_family=P1_long_cash, oos_n_trades=96 (from tournament CSV oos_n column — period count, not discrete trade count), OOS window 2018-01-01..2025-12-31 (monthly default reconstruction).
